definition.name: face_commutant_correspondence
definition.definition: (Alfsen-Shultz) Let φ ∈ S(A). The face F_{S(A)}(φ) generated by φ in the state space is affinely isomorphic to {T ∈ π_φ(A)'^+ : ⟨Tξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ = 1}. The map T ↦ ω_T where ω_T(a) = ⟨π_φ(a)Tξ_φ, ξ_φ⟩ is an affine isomorphism. Consequence: dim(F_{S(A)}(φ)) = dim_R(π_φ(A)')^{sa} - 1.
